text:
It looks like you're interested in the Share of Voice (SOV) breakdown for your site. However, the current view context only provides an overview of your overall GEO score and tier. 

To get a detailed SOV breakdown, you can check the "Scorecard" tab on your results page. This section typically includes insights into your visibility compared to competitors and how your site is performing in various categories.

If you have specific questions about the SOV or need help interpreting the data once you find it, feel free to ask!
